scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @study-agent/contracts && npm run build --workspace @study-agent/config && npm run dev --workspace @study-agent/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @study-agent/contracts && npm run build --workspace @study-agent/config && npm run build --workspace @study-agent/api && npm run build --workspace @study-agent/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @study-agent/api && npm run lint --workspace @study-agent/web
